race.comment: Very tough. ASTARI (4) is back at the races for the first time since February 5. Scored over 1100m at Traralgon to launch the last campaign and went on to race quite consistently in some decent races. He can run well fresh here. MAFEE (5) went forward and gave a great sight before finishing second last time out over 1000m at this track. Knocking on the door and has the synthetic form, go close. FILEETA (3) finished eighth over 1000m at Caulfield Heath before a spell, resuming here. She's a handy mare who draws well and can give a sight. MANHATTAN THUNDER (6) has claims on best form although has struggled on synthetics before while THE OPPORTUNIST (10) resumes with the peaks to challenge.
